message:
Merge PR #2396: fix: make --allow-stale conditional on bd version support

Detect whether bd supports --allow-stale at runtime via sync.Once probe.
Older bd versions fail on the unknown flag. Also add isJSONBytes/isJSON
helpers to gracefully handle bd returning plain text instead of JSON.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2396
Author: w1r3dh4ck3r

Co-Authored-By: Mark <w1r3dh4ck3r@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
